description: Patch-clamp and extracellular electrophysiology — ABF/NWB file loading, action potential extraction, ion channel kinetics, spike sorting, and synaptic event analysis.

packages.name: pyabf
packages.description: Python library for reading Axon Binary Format (ABF) electrophysiology files. Provides direct access to sweep data, protocol information, and metadata.

packages.name: neo
packages.description: Python package for representing and reading electrophysiology data. Supports 30+ file formats including ABF, NWB, Spike2, Plexon, and Axograph. Built on NumPy with a standardized object model.

packages.name: elephant
packages.description: Electrophysiology Analysis Toolkit — spike train statistics, spectral analysis, signal processing, current source density, GPFA, and Granger causality. Built on Neo.

packages.name: eFEL
packages.description: Electrophysiology Feature Extraction Library — extracts 200+ features from voltage traces including AP amplitude, threshold, width, AHP depth, firing rate, ISI statistics, and more.

packages.name: spikeinterface
packages.description: Unified framework for spike sorting — recording/sorting extractors, preprocessing, quality metrics, comparison, and export. Wraps many sorters (Kilosort, MountainSort, etc.).

packages.name: pynwb
packages.description: Python SDK for the Neurodata Without Borders (NWB) format. Read and write NWB:N 2.x files for sharing electrophysiology, imaging, and behavioral data.

packages.name: scipy
packages.description: Fundamental scientific computing library — signal processing (filtering, FFT, spectrograms), curve fitting (ion channel kinetics), optimization, and statistics.

packages.name: numpy
packages.description: Fundamental array computing library for Python — N-dimensional arrays, linear algebra, and numerical operations underlying all scientific packages.

packages.name: matplotlib
packages.description: Comprehensive 2D/3D plotting library — trace visualization, raster plots, phase planes, IV curves, and publication-quality figures.

packages.name: stfio
packages.description: Stimfit file I/O library — reads ABF, ATF, HEKA, Axograph, and CFS electrophysiology files. Python bindings for the Stimfit analysis program.

packages.name: pyelectro
packages.description: Electrophysiology analysis utilities — action potential detection, feature extraction, and model validation tools from the OpenWorm project.

packages.name: ipfx
packages.description: Intrinsic Physiology Feature Extractor from the Allen Institute — standardized feature extraction from intracellular electrophysiology recordings.

packages.name: quantities
packages.description: Support for physical quantities with units — volts, amperes, seconds, hertz. Used by Neo and Elephant for dimensionally-safe calculations.
